## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.create() method

Creates a LibraryRuntimeContext with a new or default ChocolateLibrary. This is the primary factory method for most use cases.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(params?: ILibraryRuntimeContextCreateParams): Result<LibraryRuntimeContext>;
```
